scenario: The package and plugin artifact include the docs, VISION contract, scorecards, runtime entries, MCP server, and declared loo_* tools needed by a local beta user.
expected_public_safe_evidence: OpenClaw dogfood installOutcome.recognizedMarker when a known OpenClaw output marker is detected
clean-profile linked install marker or already-installed diagnostic
pass_criteria: Package includes README.md, VISION.md, docs, evals, plugin manifest, and compiled runtime entries.
Plugin manifest declares the loo_ prefix and expected read/control/admin tools.
OpenClaw dogfood distinguishes installed, already_installed, link_force_unsupported, and failed linked-install outcomes without raw local paths.
Known OpenClaw prose markers are reduced to public-safe installOutcome.recognizedMarker ids instead of copying raw command output.
Release preflight/status fail closed on missing approvals without performing publish or release actions.
fail_criteria: Package omits VISION.md, scorecards, OpenClaw manifest, or MCP runtime entry.
Tool declarations drift from the MCP registry.
Linked install failures are reported as generic failures when the plugin is already loaded, or raw OpenClaw stdout/stderr enters public evidence.
Release commands perform npm publish, GitHub Release creation, live control, or GUI mutation.
known_gaps: Actual npm publish and GitHub Release creation require separate explicit approval.
Installed OpenClaw gateway smoke may be unavailable on some developer machines.
next_action: Run package dry-run and release preflight/status from the public CLI surface before beta release claims.
proof_boundary: This is a local public-safe beta scorecard example; it does not approve publishing or release creation.
